title: Chapter 114
content:
Chapter 114

“Colton’s room?” Zara asked as she looked around her son’s room. It was the room of a usual knight, nothing extravagant, but everything was expensive enough to still give it a noble vibe. Given that this house was prepared in a hurry for the noble family to move in, it probably wasn’t how his real room was set up.

“Explain why this would be better?” She asked, looking around her son’s room, naked in all her glory, logic dripping from her voice along with the wetness from her pussy, “There is only one bed, and he’s covering most of the space. This is nothing but impractical.”

I smirked at the line of questioning because if that was what she was worried about, then there was nothing to be worried about. “Lady Zara, do you remember when we performed this act in front of the young masters and the young lady?”

“Yes?” She said, not so sure where this was heading.

“Well, that day, your vagina was tighter than usual, and perhaps you could even tell yourself that you felt more pleasure and effectiveness than in our other encounters,” I replied, giving her the most bullshit reason that wouldn’t even fly by in porn.

Yet, “Your words do make sense. And we’re already here, so might as well follow your suggestion.”

The way she said it, her hand under her chin as if she was decoding scientific laws, was hilarious, more than a turn on.

“You said to climb on top of him, yes?” She asked, but before I could reply, she climbed on top of the bed, which creaked a little, but her son, sleeping on it, didn’t move. What kind of knight had such a deep sleep?

She bent over, giving me a view of her massive breasts dangling from the side. They seemed full and heavy, prompting me to just grab them and knead them like dough.

“Come on now, we do not have all day,” Zara said as she found me standing there like a dumbass.

“Of course, Lady Zara,” I replied and got up on the bed, increasing the weight on it, but it was made of good quality and managed to bear us all.

Once I was behind her, I aligned my dick with her wet entrance and, without giving her any chance to compose herself, thrusted deep in just one go.

“HAAAANNNGGG!!!” Zara didn’t just moan, she more or less alerted the whole house. I could only hope this room was soundproofed.

She wasn’t the only one struggling, as her tight depth was torturous for me as well, but I managed to recover soon enough and began to pound her like crazy.

From where I was, I could see the scene I had orchestrated perfectly. Her son was lying underneath her, with Zara panting heavily, sprawled on top of him, only a thin blanket stopping their bodies from touching, while I violated her right in front of her son.

It was exhilarating.

“YESS!!!”

Zara must have felt my dick twitching in extreme excitement as she said out loud, her own orgasm washing over her.

Unfortunately, or perhaps fortunately, the loud sounds woke the guy underneath us up.

“Mo-mother…?”

He questioned, his eyes groggy, but only for a moment before he woke up fully and looked at us with surprise as soon as his eyes got used to the moonlight lighting up the room. He registered his mother’s face inches above his, even though she was moving constantly due to my heavy thrusts; he managed to recognize her.

“Wh-what is going on here?” He asked, confused, which may have sounded like he was questioning the debauched act we were performing, but he was more confused about our presence.

Zara was in no state to answer him, as she was enjoying the pleasure too much, but I, on the other hand, was in no mood to answer him. Instead, I raised my hand and…

PAAHHH!!!

That truly woke him up. That woke me up, too, seeing her amazing ass jiggle from my slap.

“What in the name of…?!!” He tried to get up, seeing me slap his mother right in front of him, and although he couldn’t see his mother’s ass, and couldn’t tell what this really meant, all he knew was that I had hit her, and that was a no-no.

“Mother! Move!” He said to his mother, trying to move her away, and although she was weaker than him, he couldn’t push her off because she was his mother. Then he turned to me, looking over her shoulder, “And you! You damned commoner! Stop hitting her!”

Instead of complying, I only spanked her harder. First her left cheek, which was already slightly red from my constant spanking even before we got here, and then her right ass cheek with my other hand.

Pah!

Pah!

Pah!

Pah!

I must have slapped her ten times, mostly because it felt amazing spanking her and seeing her ass ripple, but also because her son kept telling me to stop that instant.

As for Zara…

“AAHH!!”

“HNN!!”

“AAYNNH!!!”

“YEENNHH!!!”

“AAANNHH!!”

“MORMM!!!”

Maybe it was just my perverted mind translating, but it sounded like she was asking for more and liking it.

I couldn’t see her face, so I couldn’t tell.

But her son could, and…

“MOTHER! HOW COULD YOU LET THIS COMMONER TREAT YOU LIKE THIS??”

He was about to push her off, without caring about hurting her, but I stopped him by pushing him down by going past Zara from the side and pushing his stomach.

“Kugh!” He grunted, surprised I could overpower him like this, even when my class was supposed to be a mage.

“Young master, please do not interrupt. Can you not see how much your mother is enjoying herself?” I asked as if he were being a selfish prick, as if he were at fault here. As if I was fucking his mother in front of him, spanking her ass red.

But the real surprise came when…

“Co-Colton, my boy…” Zara said, her voice barely a whisper due to how tired she was after constant pounding, but that wasn’t the same when it came to her moans.

“Yes, Mother…?” He asked, perhaps hopeful that his mother had come to her senses. Oh boy, his face was one to witness when she said, “Stop… making… my life… difficult…”

She managed to say that, in between her moans, but the way she said it made it clear. Zara was cursing at her son.

Wow.

“Mo-mother? How could you say that…?” He asked, as if he had been betrayed by his own mother, but in response, all Zara did was gasp and moan as I increased my speed.

“Ahhn~”

“YESS!!”

“MOREE!!!”

“HARDER!!!”

I could only wonder where the last one came from, but who was I to complain? I obliged like the good subordinate I was, and I was confident I was properly destroying her pussy.

She must have came for the third time since we got here, and the sheets between us, which just happened to be over Colton’s crotch, were wet, as if he had wet himself. But we all knew he didn’t. They were his mother’s love juices, and she was loving every second of it when she was letting them out.

Seeing her smooth back, my gaze landed on her neck, and a thought crossed my mind. I stopped for a minute, mostly to curb my orgasm, and looked at her, lying there like a lifeless doll on top of her son.

I placed my hand on her spine and slowly slid it up north towards her neck, making her shudder in response, which was transmitted to me through her very own pussy.

Once I arrived at the back of her neck, I said, “Lady Zara…”

“Mmm… mmm?” All she could do was mumble in response, but she managed to get it across that she was listening.

Knowing I had her attention, I slid my hand to the front of her throat, without applying even the slightest of pressure, and said, “There is this activity to which most women respond. Would you mind me performing it on you? It can be a bit… humiliating for a lady such as you.”

“What?! How dare you humiliate her any further than this?!” It wasn’t her who spoke up, but her son, which made sense since he wanted to protect his mother’s honor.

But, his mother really didn’t care as she asked, “Is… is it one of your strange exp… experiments?”

“Yes, Lady Zara,” I replied.

“…”

There was silence in the room for a while, and no one spoke, but it was exactly that silence that made Colton speak up, “Mother! You cannot be considering this! How could you let him treat you like this?”

He was right. Every point he made was right. So it would have made sense if Zara had agreed with him. It wouldn’t have made sense if Zara disagreed with him.

These were the only two options available in my mind.

But what I didn’t expect was the third one. Which I hadn’t even imagined in my wildest dreams.

And that was…

PAH!!!

No, that was not the sound of me spanking Zara.
